summary: Recording quality not documented, but fans celebrate Brent’s electrifying final performance and the show’s emotional intensity.
review: All of the reviews focus on the historic nature of this being Brent Mydland’s last concert, praising his “on‑fire” energy, wild stage antics and the unforgettable atmosphere. No specific comments about the audio source or mix are given, so the technical quality remains unknown, but the musical impact is described as overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong enthusiasm for the performance (70% weight) combined with a lack of any recording‑quality information (30% weight) yields an overall high rating, though confidence is limited by sparse technical detail.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues; recording quality cannot be assessed from the provided comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers emphasize the emotional weight of Brent’s final show and the overall “smoking” vibe rather than specific set structure; the concert is portrayed as a high‑energy, memorable climax to the tour.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned for his intense stare through dark glasses during the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent is described repeatedly as “on fire,” “ballistic,” and the best part of the night – a true highlight of the performance.
band_member_comments.Drums: Billy (Bill Kreutzmann) and Mickey Hart are noted laughing on stage, adding to the fun atmosphere.
